data.title: Test isolation: stale /tmp/mock-ticket-XXXXXX.sh blocks test-check-acceptance-criteria.sh
data.description: The test file tests/scripts/test-check-acceptance-criteria.sh uses mktemp with template /tmp/mock-ticket-XXXXXX.sh (line 39). If a previous test run leaves a literal file at that path (due to a crash, signal kill, or trap not firing), subsequent runs fail with 'mkstemp failed on /tmp/mock-ticket-XXXXXX.sh: File exists'. The trap on line 41 uses RETURN which only fires on function return, not on script-level signals. Fix: use a more unique template pattern (e.g., include PID or use mktemp without a fixed prefix in /tmp) and add a script-level EXIT trap for cleanup.
